folio.label: 143r
folio.l: He that his hond , wol putte in this Mitayn
He shal haue multipliyngö , of his grayn
Whan he hatú sowen , be it whete or Otes
So that he offre pens , or ellis grotes
Goode men & wo~men , oo thyngö warne I ©ow
If any wigút , be in this chirche now
That hatú don Synne horrible , that he
Dar nat for shame , of it I shryuen be
Or any wo~man , be she ©ongö or old
That hatú I maked , hire housbonde Cokewold
Swicú folk shuln haue , no power ne no gce
To offren to my relikes , in this place
And who so fyndetú hi~ , out of swicú blame
They wol come vp , and offre a goddis name
And I assoille hi~ , by the auctoritee
Whicú that by bulle , I graunted was to me
¢ By this gaude , haue I wonne ©er by ©er
An hundred mark , sithe I was Pardoner
I stonde like a Clerk , in my pulpet
And whan the lewede peeple , is doun I set
I preche so , as ©e han herd bifore
And telle an hundred , false iapes more
Thanne peyne I me , to strecche fortú the nekke
And Est and West , vp on the peeple I bekke
As dotú a dowue , sittyngö on a berne
Myne handes , and my tonge , goon so ©erne
That it is ioye , to seen my besynesse
Of auarice , and of swicú cursednesse
Is al my prechyngö , for to make hem free
To ©eue here pens , and namely vn to me
For myn entente is nat , but for to wynne
And no thyngö , for correcciou~ of synne
I rekke neuäe , whan that they ben beryed
Thougú that here soules , gon a blakeberyed
For certes , many a predicaciouö
Cometú ofte , of Yuel entenciou~
Som for plesau~ce of folk , and flaterie
To ben a vaunced , by Ypocrisye
And som for veyn glorie , and som for hate
For whan I dar , noon other weyes debate
Thanne wol I stynge hiö , witú my tonge smerte
In pächyngö , so that he , shal nat a sterte
To ben defamed falsly , if that he
Hatú trespased , to myne bretheren or to me
